background: Homeworld: Caprice (Solomani Rim 2122) - Commercial district. Born Julia Vale, transitioned at age 22. Self-made merchant prince who built information network across the Rim while working through university. Started trading information between merchants. SolSec noticed his network and offered partnership instead of prosecution. Now one of the Rim's most connected individuals, with contacts from dock workers to admirals. Speaks 6 languages fluently.
terms: Merchant (Broker): Broker-1, Persuade-1, Admin-1. Started information trading business while in university. Advanced to rank 1.
Merchant (Broker): Broker-2, Streetwise-1, Carouse-1. Built network across commercial districts. Transitioned at age 22, became Jordan Vale. Advanced to rank 2.
Merchant (Broker): Broker-3, Persuade-2, Deception-1, Investigate-1. Expanded network to multiple worlds. Advanced to rank 3.

Merchant (Broker): Broker-4, Persuade-3, Deception-2, Streetwise-2, Diplomat-1. Became major information broker. SolSec took notice. Advanced to rank 4. Mustering out: Trading Company (Vale Interstellar Solutions), 100000cr.
Agent (Intelligence): Deception-3, Streetwise-3, Admin-2, Carouse-2, Investigate-2. Recruited by SolSec, offered partnership and resources. Advanced to rank 1.

Agent (Intelligence): Diplomat-2, Electronics (comms)-1, Gun Combat (slug)-1, Stealth-1, Language (vilani)-2. Built empire while serving Confederation interests. Advanced to rank 2. Mustering out: Body Pistol, Encrypted Data Crystals, Contacts Database, 50000cr.
interactions: Expertise: Information brokering, trading, negotiation, reading people, logistics, bribery, social engineering at all levels, languages (6 fluent), business operations, network building
Weaknesses: Self-made pride can be defensive, occasionally uses mystery about past as shield, can be ruthless when betrayed

Role: Fixer/Intelligence - Handles logistics, bribery, information gathering, social engineering at all levels. Can pose as merchant, corporate executive, or information broker (all legitimate covers)

Gender Identity: Fully transitioned at 22, living as male for 13 years. Medical transition complete, all documents legally changed. Socially accepted in cosmopolitan Solomani areas. Most people unaware unless he chooses to tell them

armour.name: Designer Suits
armour.traits: Masculine cut, impeccably tailored, various styles

weapons.name: Body Pistol
weapons.traits: Easily concealed, undetectable by most scanners

equipment.name: Vale Interstellar Solutions
equipment.traits: Legitimate trading company, SolSec front, worth millions

contacts.kind: Marcus DeLeon (Imperial noble, secret Solomani sympathizer)
